subcodes.first_line: O spiritual youth! Thou hast raised thy voice in lamentation and woe at separation and deprivation, and expressed thy yearning and burning grief at remoteness from the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان رحمانی ناله و فغان از هجران و حرمان نمودی و حسرت و حرقت از فرقت جمال
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God
